title: quercus winkleriana
intro: Quercus winkleriana, also known as the Chinese cork tree, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The bark and leaves of Quercus winkleriana contain compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and boosted immune system function. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves can be dried and processed into teas, infusions, or capsules, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties.
